categories.composite_risk: 3-way and 4-way composite risk score, regime history, conditional returns, and multi-signal interaction tables.
categories.turbulence: Cross-asset covariance turbulence, regime transition probabilities, and historical signal dates.
categories.fragility: Three-tier Absorption Ratio alerts plus per-asset PC1/PC2 eigenvector loadings history.
categories.sentiment: GDELT-derived per-asset tone, volume, heatmap, outlier alerts, and geopolitical tension indicators.
categories.liquidity: Global Liquidity Index composite, monthly history, and regional breakdown.
categories.stat_arb: Mean-reversion opportunity scanner across 550+ securities with full 16-field metrics.
categories.ai_intelligence: Cross-pillar market briefing, GPT-4o narrative commentary, and dashboard-grade Signal Strategist snapshot.
categories.supporting: Annual asset-class returns and RAG-scored stablecoin scorecard.

tools.name: get_risk_score
tools.description: Current composite risk score (0–100) with regime classification, duration, AR/turbulence/GDELT decomposition, fragile-shock status, count of elevated signals, and the 4-way liquidity-gated extension with GLI/PLI/PSI/XFI readings.
tools.example_prompt: What's the current market risk regime?

tools.name: get_risk_history
tools.description: Daily composite risk score, regime label, and regime duration for the last N days.
tools.example_prompt: How has the risk regime evolved over the last 60 days?

tools.name: get_conditional_returns
tools.description: Historical return statistics by regime per core asset — mean return, P(negative), and CVaR.
tools.example_prompt: What tends to happen to SPY in a stress regime over the next 21 days?

tools.name: get_interaction_table
tools.description: 2×2×2 conditional returns table across the three primary signal dimensions, for a given asset.
tools.example_prompt: Show me the interaction between the three signal dimensions for SPY returns.

tools.name: get_turbulence_score
tools.description: Daily and 10-day rolling turbulence percentiles with quartile classifications and regime labels.
tools.example_prompt: How unusual are today's cross-asset moves?

tools.name: get_transition_probabilities
tools.description: Markov Q1–Q3 transition matrices for daily and 10-day rolling turbulence states — P(remain) and P(move) by state and duration bucket.
tools.example_prompt: How long do these turbulence regimes typically last?

tools.name: get_signal_dates
tools.description: Historical bearish (Type A) and bullish (Type B) signal dates with percentile, strength, subsequent asset returns, and outcome.
tools.example_prompt: Show historical analogues for the current turbulence signal.

tools.name: get_absorption_ratio
tools.description: Three-tier Absorption Ratio alert system (30-day Watch, 60-day Warning, 90-day Crisis) with classification, active-tier count, and overall alert level.
tools.example_prompt: Is systemic fragility triggering any alerts today?

tools.name: get_fragility_loadings
tools.description: 30-day Absorption Ratio history tail — aggregate time series only.
tools.example_prompt: What's the recent fragility trajectory?

tools.name: get_pc_loadings_history
tools.description: Per-asset PC1/PC2 eigenvector loadings across 30/60/90-day rolling windows, with variance_explained per date. Reveals exactly which assets are driving systemic coupling.
tools.example_prompt: Which assets are driving PC1 loadings right now, and how has that shifted over the last 60 days?

tools.name: get_media_sentiment
tools.description: GDELT-derived tone, volume, z-scores, composite signal, and alert flags for specified assets (27+ tracked).

parameters.name: tickers
parameters.description: Comma-separated tickers, or omit for all.

tools.example_prompt: What's media sentiment saying about gold and Bitcoin?

tools.name: get_sentiment_heatmap
tools.description: All assets sorted by composite-signal magnitude — full sentiment heatmap in structured form.
tools.example_prompt: Show me the full sentiment ranking across every asset.

tools.name: get_sentiment_alerts
tools.description: Only assets with |tone z| > 2 or |volume z| > 2 — the actionable outliers.
tools.example_prompt: Which assets have sentiment outliers today?

tools.name: get_geopolitical_tone
tools.description: Global Goldstein Scale average and conflict ratio as a macro geopolitical tension indicator.
tools.example_prompt: What's the current global geopolitical tension level?

tools.name: get_global_liquidity
tools.description: GLI (0–100) with PLI / PSI / XFI sub-indices, cycle phase, XFI-nowcast flag, and regional breakdown.
tools.example_prompt: How tight are global liquidity conditions?

tools.name: get_liquidity_history
tools.description: Monthly GLI + sub-indices time series with cycle phase per observation.
tools.example_prompt: How have liquidity conditions trended over the last two years?

tools.name: get_regional_liquidity
tools.description: Per-region liquidity readings (US, Eurozone, China, Japan, UK) with comparative rankings.
tools.example_prompt: How are US liquidity conditions compared to Europe, China, and Japan?

tools.name: get_oversold_opportunities
tools.description: Oversold securities ranked by opportunity score — no minimum threshold; every flagged candidate is returned, ranked.
tools.example_prompt: What's cheap right now and likely to bounce back?

tools.name: get_overbought_opportunities
tools.description: Overbought securities ranked by opportunity score.
tools.example_prompt: Which names look stretched to the upside and due for a pullback?

tools.name: get_ticker_metrics
tools.description: Full 16-field quantitative profile for any of 550+ tickers — z-score, RSI, Bollinger %B, MACD, mean reversion score, ADF, Hurst, half-life, CVaR, and volatility.
tools.example_prompt: Give me the full quantitative profile for NVDA.

tools.name: get_stat_arb_summary
tools.description: Overview: oversold and overbought counts across the universe plus the top 5 opportunities each direction.
tools.example_prompt: What's at extremes today across the stat-arb universe?

tools.name: get_market_briefing
tools.description: One-call synthesis across every pillar — regime, fragility alerts, turbulence, sentiment outliers, liquidity phase, and top stat-arb candidates.
tools.example_prompt: Give me a full market briefing.

tools.name: get_gpt_commentary
tools.description: GPT-4o-generated narrative commentary on transition probabilities and daily asset moves.
tools.example_prompt: What's the narrative read on today's market?

tools.name: get_signal_strategist
tools.description: Dashboard-grade snapshot: regime gauge, decomposition, 4-way liquidity-gated score, GLI/PLI/PSI/XFI readings, and conditional returns.
tools.example_prompt: Give me the Signal Strategist dashboard read.

tools.name: get_periodic_returns
tools.description: Annual returns for 20 asset classes (2018–present including YTD) with risk metrics — Sharpe, Sortino, Omega, max drawdown.
tools.example_prompt: How have asset classes performed this year versus their long-term track record?

tools.name: get_stablecoin_scorecard
tools.description: Red / Amber / Green assessment across 10 dimensions per major stablecoin — reserve model, regulatory status, transparency, custody, attestation, and more.
tools.example_prompt: Compare stablecoin risk profiles.

resources.name: Daily Risk Snapshot
resources.description: Today's composite risk score plus 4-way liquidity-gated extension (deterministic).

resources.name: Methodology Overview
resources.description: Static reference — the eight pillars, the data sources, and the output contract.
